task_completion.description: Verify the fast-charging station is correctly configured in an XML file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an open XML file or terminal output showing a <chargingStation> element with id='fast_charger', power='250000', efficiency='0.95', lane='2[1][1][1]b_0', startPos='35', and endPos='55'.

task_completion.description: Verify the bus vType is equipped with the correct battery parameters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an open XML file or terminal output showing the bus <vType> configuration with battery device parameters, specifically maximumBatteryCapacity='300000' and actualBatteryCapacity='150000'.

task_completion.description: Verify the SUMO simulation was run and generated the battery output file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for terminal output showing a successful SUMO execution (e.g., 'sumo -c ...') and the creation or existence of the file '/home/ga/SUMO_Output/battery.xml'.

task_completion.description: Verify the report file contains the correct charging lane ID.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the contents of '/home/ga/SUMO_Output/ev_report.txt' (via text editor or terminal command like 'cat') showing 'charging_lane=2[1][1][1]b_0'.

task_completion.description: Verify the report file contains the correct minimum battery level.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the contents of '/home/ga/SUMO_Output/ev_report.txt' showing 'min_battery_wh=150000.00'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually ran the SUMO simulation to generate the battery output.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for terminal commands invoking 'sumo' or 'sumo-gui' and the corresponding simulation progress/completion logs, rather than just creating a mock battery.xml file.

integrity.description: Verify the agent inspected the bus stops file to find the correct location.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for terminal commands (like 'cat', 'grep', or opening in an editor) targeting 'pasubio_bus_stops.add.xml' to extract the lane and position data before configuring the charging station.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the specified directories for scenarios and outputs.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for file paths in the terminal or editor confirming the use of '/home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/' for configuration and '/home/ga/SUMO_Output/' for the battery.xml and ev_report.txt files.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct first bus stop location is on lane '2[1][1][1]b_0' with startPos 35 and endPos 55. Running the SUMO simulation correctly with the requested battery parameters results in a minimum actualBatteryCapacity of exactly 150000.00 Wh, because the buses' default emissionClass does not consume electric energy. A successful agent report at /home/ga/SUMO_Output/ev_report.txt must indicate 'charging_lane=2[1][1][1]b_0' and 'min_battery_wh=150000.00'.
